## Validation

- [ ] `bun run lint`
- [ ] `bun run type-check`
- [ ] `bun run test`
- [ ] `bun run build`
- [ ] `bun run test:e2e` (if UI changed)
- [ ] DECISIONS.md updated (if non-obvious decision taken)
- [ ] docs/*.md updated (if convention introduced or changed)
